zh.Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯
zh.Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰
zh.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Seigneur Alain V De Rohan於1205年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯時，他的父親Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan39歲，母親Mabile de Fougeres43歲。他於1228年與Aliénor de Porhoët在法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1232年在他的家鄉享年27歲。

zh-hans.Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯

zh-hans.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Seigneur Alain V De Rohan于1205年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯时，他的父亲Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan39岁，母亲Mabile de Fougeres43岁。他于1228年与Aliénor de Porhoët在法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1232年在他的家乡享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: When Seigneur Alain V De Rohan was born in 1205, in Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan, was 39 and his mother, Mabile de Fougeres, was 43. He married Aliénor de Porhoët in 1228, in Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1232, in his hometown, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seigneur Alain V De Rohan est né en 1205, à Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mabile de Fougeres, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Aliénor de Porhoët en 1228, à Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1232, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seigneur Alain V De Rohan 1205 in Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan 39 und seine Mutter Mabile de Fougeres 43. Er hat 1228 in Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Aliénor de Porhoët geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1232 im Alter von 27 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Alain V De Rohan è nato il nel 1205 nel Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mabile de Fougeres, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Aliénor de Porhoët nel 1228, nel Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1232, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France: フランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズ
ja.Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハンロハン
ja.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズ
ja.lifeSummary: Seigneur Alain V De Rohanが1205年にフランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズで生まれた時，父Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohanは39歳，母Mabile de Fougeresは43歳であった。1228年にフランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズでAliénor de Porhoëtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1232年に故郷で27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Seigneur Alain V De Rohan(이)가 1205년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 길리어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabile de Fougeres(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1228년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 길리어스에서 Aliénor de Porhoët(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1232년 그의 고향에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Alain V De Rohan nasceu em 1205, em Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mabile de Fougeres, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Aliénor de Porhoët em 1228, em Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1232, em sua cidade natal, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seigneur Alain V De Rohan родился в 1205 г. в местности гуиллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabile de Fougeres, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Aliénor de Porhoët в 1228 г. в местности гуиллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1232 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seigneur Alain V De Rohan nació en 1205, en Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mabile de Fougeres, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Aliénor de Porhoët en 1228, en Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1232, en su pueblo, a la edad de 27 años.
